completed_stories.title: Wire Macro Regime into Conviction Score
Expand Ticker Universe with Sector ETFs
Open Trade Age Indicator and Quick-Close UI
Add Sector Field to Ticker Model
Pre-Flight Variance Check in Weight Optimiser
Signal Health Endpoint + AV Warning Banner
Seed T10Y2Y Historical Data
completed_stories.notes: FredClient.get_series_range() added. scripts/seed_t10y2y.py created and run: 812 T10Y2Y rows seeded (2023-01-01 to 2026-04-05). H12 unblocked. 8/8 tests passing.

completed_stories.title: FRED News/Sentiment Fallback
completed_stories.notes: FredSentimentService (UMCSENT 50% + VIXCLS 30% + USEPUINDXD 20%) created. Wired into swing.py with AV-unavailable guard. Scheduler extended with UMCSENT + USEPUINDXD. 9/9 tests passing. Note: historical UMCSENT/USEPUINDXD not yet seeded — scheduler will start daily ingestion from today.

completed_stories.title: Conviction Threshold Filter (min_conviction param)
completed_stories.notes: GET /api/scores/universe/{u}?min_conviction=N and GET /api/scores?min_conviction=N added. Optional[int] ge=0 le=100. None conviction treated as 0. 6/6 tests passing.

sprint_notes: Sprint 11 complete. S31: T10Y2Y seeded (812 rows) — H12 now has real data (BEAR<40=64.1% win). S32: FRED sentiment fallback live in scoring. S33: min_conviction filter on universe endpoint. 181/181 tests. Next: S34 (regime-conditional UI guidance), S35 (seed UMCSENT/USEPUINDXD history), S36 (fix display bug), S37 (H10 back-fill bias investigation).
